calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Derek D. Lim, Esq., of Law Offices of Derek D. Lim, Tel. 510.818.0898, acting as interpreter (Cantonese) for Respondent.
Lina Yu, Respondent appearing on her own behalf. (no card)

Respondent Lina Yu was sworn and examined by the court. After hearing, and to the satisfaction of the court, PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE'S Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is granted. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Continued To Mar-01-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel J. De Vries, Esq., of De Vries Law Group, Tel. 831.623.4100, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Lina Yu, Tel. 415.661.1342, respondent (appearing on her own behalf) and opposing party.

After hearing, the court ruled as follows: PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE's Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is continued to March 1, 2012. Plaintiff shall arrange for a Cantonese interpreter to be present at the hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Continued To Feb-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel J. De Vries, Esq., De Vries Law Group, 831-623-4100, for petitioner Symetra, appearing by telephone
Lina Yu Hwang, 415-661-1343, respondent in Pro Per

Discussed and tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE'S Notice Of Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is Continued on the court's own motion to February 14, 2012. Petitioner to send courtesy copies to Department 302, to be delivered by February 6 and must be accompanied by a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
